dashboard.activeThreats_one: {{count}} active threat found - review and take action below
dashboard.activeThreats_other: {{count}} active threats found - review and take action below
dashboard.realtimeActive: Real-time protection is active and monitoring your system
dashboard.notMonitored: Your system is not being monitored - enable protection in Settings
dashboard.noReputationKeys: Cloud threat intelligence is disabled — reputation lookups and threat feeds are inactive
dashboard.noReputationKeysAction: Add API keys in Settings to enable VirusTotal and MalwareBazaar lookups

realtime.monitoringActive: Monitoring active - scan results will appear here
realtime.unresolvedWarning: {{count}} unresolved threats detected. Please review and take action.
realtime.fpHint: Low confidence detection. If this is legitimate software, click "Trust & Whitelist" to prevent future false positives.
realtime.confirmQuarantineMessage: Move this file to quarantine? It will be isolated and can be restored later.
realtime.confirmDeleteMessage: Permanently delete this threat file? This action cannot be undone.

scanner.title: System Scanner
scanner.description: Scan your system for malware, suspicious files, and security threats
scanner.enterPathError: Please enter a folder or file path for custom scan
scanner.noThreats: No threats detected. Your system appears to be clean.
scanner.enterScheduleName: Please enter a name for the scheduled scan
scanner.enterSchedulePath: Please enter a path for custom scan
scanner.deleteScheduleMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this scheduled scan?
scanner.customDescription: Scan a specific folder or file

quarantine.title: Quarantine
quarantine.hintText: Detected threats will appear here for your review.
quarantine.confirmRestoreMessage: Restore this file from quarantine to its original location?
quarantine.confirmDeleteMessage: Permanently delete this file? This action cannot be undone.

settings.title: Settings
settings.languageHelp: Choose the display language for the application
settings.appUpdatesHelp: Checks for a newer installer version and lets you download it when available.
settings.appUpToDate: You're on the latest available version (v{{version}}).
settings.updateAvailableHelp: You're currently on v{{currentVersion}}. Download the latest installer to upgrade.
settings.updateDismissed: This update will stay hidden until a newer version is released.
settings.updateAvailableNotificationBody: Installer v{{version}} is ready to download.
settings.aiDescription: Controls how aggressive the machine learning detection is
settings.relaxedHelp: Fewer alerts, may miss some threats
settings.aggressiveHelp: More alerts, catches more potential threats
settings.notProtected: Your system is not protected from new threats
settings.monitorFolders: Monitor Downloads, Desktop, and Home folders for new files
settings.autoQuarantineHelp: Automatically move detected malware to quarantine
settings.launchAtStartupHelp: Automatically start InSecurity when you log in to protect your system from the moment it boots
settings.ransomwareHelp: Monitors protected folders for bulk file modifications that may indicate ransomware activity. Alerts when {{threshold}}+ files are modified within {{window}} seconds.
settings.autoBlockHelp: Automatically terminate processes suspected of ransomware activity when an alert triggers
settings.thresholdHelp: Alert triggers when the threshold number of files are modified within the time window. Lower values are more sensitive. Thresholds auto-adapt when alerts are dismissed as false positives.
settings.canaryHelp: Hidden decoy files placed in protected folders. If ransomware modifies them, an immediate critical alert fires — bypassing all thresholds.
settings.canaryRefreshed: Canary files refreshed in all protected folders
settings.scanWorkersHelp: Number of files scanned in parallel during Quick/Full scans. More workers = faster scans but higher CPU/memory usage. Recommended: 4-8.
settings.cacheHelp: The cache stores scan results to avoid re-scanning unchanged files.
settings.clearCacheHelp: Removes cached scan results (files will be re-scanned).
settings.networkDescription: Monitor network traffic, block malicious domains, and manage firewall rules
settings.networkMonitoringHelp: Monitor active TCP connections and detect communication with known malicious IPs
settings.autoBlockMalwareHelp: Automatically create Windows Firewall rules to block detected malware from communicating
settings.apiKeysHelp: Optional keys for cloud-based threat intelligence. The app works without them but reputation lookups and threat feeds will be disabled.
settings.vtHelp: Free key from virustotal.com — enables file reputation lookups against 70+ antivirus engines
settings.mbHelp: Free key from abuse.ch — enables threat intelligence feeds and malware hash lookups
settings.apiKeysStoredSecurely: Keys are stored in Windows Credential Manager, not in the visible settings file.

ransomware.honeypotTampered: A honeypot file was tampered with — this is a strong indicator of ransomware or malicious file encryption.
ransomware.bulkModifications: Rapid bulk file modifications were detected in a protected folder. This is a heuristic warning, not a confirmation of ransomware, but it can indicate unwanted encryption.
ransomware.falsePositiveHint: If you recognize this activity, mark it as a false positive to temporarily relax ransomware detection for this folder.
ransomware.reviewProcesses: Review the related processes shown above
ransomware.verifyRecentActivity: Verify whether a recent app, sync client, export, or batch job caused these changes
ransomware.markFalsePositiveAction: If you recognize the activity, mark it as a false positive

firewall.title: Firewall Rules ({{count}})
firewall.description: Block executables from network access via Windows Firewall

connections.title: Active Connections ({{count}})
connections.description: Live TCP connections — refreshes every 3 seconds
connections.filterPlaceholder: Filter by process, IP, or port...

audit.title: Security Audit Log
audit.description: All security-relevant actions are logged with tamper-evident signatures. This helps detect if someone has modified your security settings or bypassed protection.
audit.eventsHint: Events will appear here as you use the application.

details.whitelistCleared: All user whitelist entries cleared ({{count}} entries)
details.ransomwareThresholds: Ransomware thresholds updated: {{threshold}} files in {{window}} seconds
details.ransomwareAlertDismissed: Ransomware alert dismissed for {{folder}} — adaptive threshold raised
details.canaryTripwire: CANARY TRIPWIRE: honeypot file tampered in {{folder}}
details.ransomwareBehavior: Ransomware behavior detected: {{count}} bulk modifications in {{folder}}

whitelistMgr.title: User Whitelist
whitelistMgr.description: Files you marked as trusted via "Trust & Whitelist". These hashes are excluded from future detections. Remove an entry to re-enable scanning for that file.
whitelistMgr.emptyText: No user-whitelisted files. When you click "Trust & Whitelist" on a detected threat, it will appear here.
whitelistMgr.confirmRemoveMessage:
Remove "{{name}}" from whitelist?

This file will be flagged again on the next scan.
whitelistMgr.removedSuccess: Removed from whitelist. "{{name}}" will be re-evaluated on the next scan.
whitelistMgr.confirmClearMessage:
Remove all {{count}} entries from the whitelist?

All previously whitelisted files will be flagged again on the next scan.
whitelistMgr.clearedSuccess_one: Cleared {{count}} whitelist entry. These files will be re-evaluated on the next scan.
whitelistMgr.clearedSuccess_other: Cleared {{count}} whitelist entries. These files will be re-evaluated on the next scan.

exclusions.title: Exclusions Manager
exclusions.description: Whitelist trusted paths, folders, or file types from scanning
exclusions.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this exclusion?
exclusions.noExclusionsHint: Add paths, folders, or patterns that should be skipped during scans

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.message: An unexpected error occurred. The application has been prevented from crashing.

threatIntel.quarantineImmediatelyDesc: This file has been identified as malware. Move it to quarantine to prevent potential damage.
threatIntel.reviewQuarantineDesc: This file shows suspicious behavior. If you don't recognize it, consider quarantining.
threatIntel.possibleFPDesc: Low confidence detection. If this is legitimate software, click Trust & Whitelist to prevent future alerts.
threatIntel.noPersistence: No persistence mechanisms detected for this file.
